allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Pulse360 - Employee Feedback Platform

Features:
- Backend API REST with Node.js, Express, Prisma
- Frontend with Next.js 14, React 18, TailwindCSS
- PostgreSQL database with complete schema
- JWT authentication with role-based access
- Slack Bot integration for notifications
- Docker and Docker Compose configuration
- Neobrutalismo elegant design system

Includes:
- Manager evaluation system \(ratings 1-10\)
- Confidential complaint system \(Ouvidoria\)
- Manager public profiles with badges
- Dashboard for employees, managers, and HR
- Manager ranking system
- Rate limiting for spam protection
- Data export functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix TypeScript errors and configure Supabase support

Changes:
- Add ''bio'' field to gestor type in auth store
- Update Prisma schema with directUrl for Supabase pooler
- Update all .env.example files with Supabase config
- Update README with Supabase setup instructions
- Update docker-compose to remove local PostgreSQL dependency
- Update Dockerfile to use prisma db push instead of migrate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
